CustomField.description: Looks at the Assigned To field and populates the email for quick reference.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL( Team_Member_Assigned__c , "Wahid Khan"), "wahid@thelodestonegroup.com", IF(ISPICKVAL(Team_Member_Assigned__c, "Mahesh Gangode"), "mahesh@thelodestonegroup.com", IF(ISPICKVAL(Team_Member_Assigned__c, "Erick Daniel Dela Rosa"), "erick@thelodestonegroup.com", IF(ISPICKVAL(Team_Member_Assigned__c, "Zack"), "zack@thelodestonegroup.com", ""))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Looks at the Assigned To field and populates the email for quick reference.
CustomField.label: Case Assignee Email
